1.webp.caption: Category: Environment. Visual DNA: Round, soft edges, thick outlines, flat shaded with soft gradients. Warm pastel palette. Design Principles: Soft curves for guiding lines, lighter foreground vs darker background depth contrast, exaggerated proportions. tag: Gameplay_Fishing, material: soft_vector, rarity: common, visibility: high_contrast_UI

2.webp.caption: Category: Prop/Interactable. Visual DNA: Smooth oval shape, glowing magical material, epic rarity, bright pink contrasting with dark background. Design Principles: High affordance via glowing contrast indicating reward. tag: Reward_Egg, material: magical_glow, rarity: epic, visibility: high_salience

3.webp.caption: Category: UI. Visual DNA: Chunky boxes, rounded corners, thick dark outlines, wood/thatch materials, vibrant item colors against earthy UI frames. Design Principles: Clear hierarchy, bright banners, distinct item silhouettes. tag: UI_Shop, material: wood_vector, rarity: mixed, visibility: clear_hierarchy

4.webp.caption: Category: UI. Visual DNA: Concentric circles, chunky rounded wood, bright action buttons. Design Principles: High affordance SPIN button, clear reward readability. tag: UI_SpinWheel, material: wood_vector, rarity: common, visibility: clear_CTA

6.webp.caption: Category: Character. Visual DNA: Chibi proportions, big head, large eyes, extremely round shapes, thick bold outlines, flat colors. Design Principles: Strong simple silhouette, front-facing body alignment, head is 50% of body. tag: App_Icon_Character, material: flat_vector, rarity: iconic, visibility: maximum
